# crates/attractor-pipeline/tests

End-to-end integration tests for the pipeline execution engine, validating DOT graph parsing, node execution order, conditional routing, goal gates, stylesheet cascade, context propagation, edge selection logic, retry behavior, and graph validation across 15 async test cases.

## Contents

### [integration.rs](./integration.rs)
End-to-end tests exercising `PipelineExecutor::run`, `PipelineGraph::from_dot`, `validate_or_raise`, `parse_stylesheet`, and `apply_stylesheet`. Defines `build_graph`, `executor`, `MockCodergenHandler`, `AlwaysFailHandler`, `FailOnceThenSucceedHandler` helpers.

## Behavioral Contracts

DOT node shape meanings: `shape="Mdiamond"` = start, `shape="Msquare"` = terminal, `shape="box"` = process, `shape="diamond"` = conditional.

Edge attributes: `condition="outcome=success"`, `weight=N`. Node attributes: `prompt="..."`, `goal_gate=true`, `retry_target="..."`, `class="..."`. Graph-level: `goal = "..."`.

## Key Integration Points

| Crate | Symbols Used |
|-------|--------------|
| `attractor_dot` | `attractor_dot::parse` |
| `attractor_pipeline` | `PipelineExecutor::run`, `PipelineGraph::from_dot`, `HandlerRegistry::new`, `validate`, `validate_or_raise`, `parse_stylesheet`, `apply_stylesheet` |
| `attractor_types` | `Context`, `Outcome`, `StageStatus` |

Registered mock handlers: `StartHandler`, `ExitHandler`, `ConditionalHandler`, `MockCodergenHandler` (type `"codergen"`).

## Test Coverage

15 async tests across categories: linear execution (2), branching (2), goal gates (3), validation (3), stylesheet cascade (1), context propagation (1), edge selection (2), graph attributes (1).
